title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Acquires Lighthouse Insurance Group, LLC
text: ROLLING MEADOWS, Ill, May 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. today announced the acquisition of Independence, Ohio-based Lighthouse Insurance Group, LLC (LIG).
